zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynell是Hugh de Meynell的兒子，於1334年出生在英國德比夏爾明日香 密爾。他於1357年與Joan de Kirk在英國英格蘭德比夏爾柯克 明日香結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1376年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynell是Hugh de Meynell的儿子，于1334年出生在英国德比夏爾明日香 密爾。他于1357年与Joan de Kirk在英国英格兰德比夏爾柯克 明日香结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1376年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Norman, English: locative name from one of the French places named Mesnil, from Old French mesnil (Latin * mansionile, a diminutive of mansio ‘abode, habitation’), used of the country domain where a noble lived with his family and retainers. As a surname it may also be used of a member of the household, retainer. Some of the bearers listed below may belong to (2).
2 English: relationship name from the Continental Germanic female personal name Maginhild.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynell was born in 1334, in Langley Mill, Derbyshire, England as the son of Hugh de Meynell. He married Joan de Kirk in 1357, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1376, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynell est né en 1334, à Langley Mill, Derbyshire, Angleterre, fils de Hugh de Meynell. Il a épousé Joan de Kirk en 1357, à Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1376, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynellは1334年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアラングリー ミルでHugh de Meynellの息子として生まれた。1357年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーでJoan de Kirkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1376年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynell(은)는 1334년 영국 더비실르 랭글리 미에서 Hugh de Meynell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1357년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 Joan de Kirk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1376년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Meynell родился в 1334 г. в местности лангли милл, дирбишир, Англия. Его отца звали Hugh de Meynell. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Kirk в 1357 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1376 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.
